blockingIssues.description: Feature commit e18c8c1 includes a large out-of-scope validation artifact from multi-user-landing (.factory/validation/multi-user-landing/user-testing/flows/auth-browser-flows.json), breaking feature traceability.
Feature commit e18c8c1 includes broad unrelated UI/theme rewrites (for example src/components/ui/Tabs.tsx and many other UI files), contaminating commit scope for a publish/security feature.

appliedUpdates.description: Added monorepo git-root and path-scoped staging guidance to .factory/library/environment.md.
Updated font stack reference in .factory/library/architecture.md to match tailwind.config.ts (Plus Jakarta Sans/Inter).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require agent-browser evidence for UI-affecting features and disallow reporting followedProcedure=true when required UI verification tooling was not used.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both fix-font-classes-and-video-stub and fix-dashboard-caching-and-zod reported pass while transcript skeletons showed no agent-browser tool calls despite UI verification requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align mission font guidance with the active Tailwind config (Plus Jakarta Sans/Inter), or explicitly require changing config when mission guidance specifies different fonts.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Mission AGENTS.md states Syne/Space Grotesk while tailwind.config.ts defines Plus Jakarta Sans/Inter.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a mandatory staged-scope check before commit in monorepo context (for example path-scoped add plus git diff --cached scope verification).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-publish-route-and-security staged and committed broad unrelated changes, including artifacts from another validation area.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add fullstack-worker commit hygiene step requiring path-scoped staging and explicit staged-diff review (`git diff --cached`) before commit.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The reviewed failing feature transcript used broad staging and required corrective git resets, then still landed unrelated files in the final commit.
